retrieved_result: How to Divide Tracks in Audacity 1 Open Audacity. This program's icon resembles a blue pair of headphones with a red and orange sound wave in the middle of them. If you haven't yet installed Audacity, you can download it for Mac or PC from the official site: http://www.audacityteam.org/You may encounter bugs while running Audacity
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Audacity, an audio editing tool, not software development IDEs. It is not relevant to the query about top IDEs.
